{{Infobox character
| name = First Elder
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = First Elder, elder
| abilities = Fox Dream technique
| affiliations = Wei clan
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[First Elder Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The First [[Elder]] is a high-ranking figure within the [[Path of the White Fox]] and serves as a [[Forger]]. Physically, he is characterized by a thin, upright stature, extremely long eyebrows that reach toward his hair, and a wispy beard that extends to the floor. His attire consists of [[jade]] and gold robes that complement the architecture of the [[Clan Hall]], where he frequently conducts soul testing for young Wei. As a [[Forger]], his abilities involve creating intricate, detailed illusions composed of light and dreams rather than physical substance. While these deceptions lack structural durability, they are highly complex. The First [[Elder]] has maintained a personal interest in Wei Shi [[Lindon]] since the latter's initial [[madra]] test, during which the elder determined that [[Lindon]] was unsouled and lacked spiritual affinity. In his leadership role, he consults with other elders regarding environmental factors like [[earth aura]] and stands ready to defend his path against powerful adversaries.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|As a leader within the [[Wei clan]], the First [[Elder]] resides in a home specifically suited for the cultivation of [[White Fox]] [[madra]]. Dressed in [[jade]] and gold robes that mirror the architecture of the [[Clan Hall]], this elder is distinguished by very long eyebrows. While standing upon the stairs of the [[Hall of Elders]], the First [[Elder]] requested a meeting with [[Lindon]] to review the day's occurrences. This leader expected [[Lindon]]'s arrival before sunset on the day of the [[Foundation tournament]] and ultimately provided him with the book [[Path of the White Fox]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[First Elder]] requested [[Lindon]]'s presence to review the events of the day.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[First Elder]] is a leader within the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[First Elder]]'s robes are [[jade]] and gold to match the pillars and tiles of the [[Clan Hall]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[First Elder]] has very long eyebrows.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[First Elder]] stands on the stairs of the [[Hall of Elders]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[First Elder]] of the [[Wei clan]] lives in a house that is perfect for cultivating [[White Fox]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[First Elder]] gave [[Lindon]] the book [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[First Elder]] expected to see [[Lindon]] before sunset on the day of the [[Foundation tournament]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|While visiting the [[Eighth Elder]], the First [[Elder]] of the [[Wei clan]] met with [[Lindon]] to discuss recent earthquake activity. Having previously taken a personal interest in [[Lindon]] during his initial [[madra]] test, the elder engaged with him using the [[Fox Dream]] technique. During their encounter, [[Lindon]] seized the First [[Elder]] by the scruff of his neck.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is there to see the [[First Elder]] regarding recent earthquakes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[First Elder]] is visiting the [[Eighth Elder]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[First Elder]] is an elder of the [[Wei clan]] who took a personal interest in [[Lindon]] during his first [[madra]] test.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[First Elder]] uses the [[Fox Dream]] technique.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] seized the [[First Elder]] by the scruff of his neck.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Wei clan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
